title: Permission Schema (Atomic RBAC Unit)
description: Defines atomic permission units used for RBAC assignment. Permissions are strictly declarative and MUST NOT influence identity, registry state, or federation behavior.

resource.description: Target system domain (API, registry, federation, etc.)

action.description: Atomic action allowed on resource (read, write, delete, validate, etc.)

conditions.description: Non-authoritative constraints. MUST NOT be used to override system-level decisions.
